title: Project Capsaicin - Optimized Minecraft Servers
description: Optimize your modded servers with a collection of performance boosting mods.
body:
Modded servers lag! Make your server eat a chili to speed it up!

# Mod Overview:
- Lithium - fixes block and entity lag
- Krypton - optimizes server networking stack
- Chunky - progenerate chunks
- C2ME - optimizes chunk generation
- Debugify - patch many known bugs
- Ferrite core - optimize server memory usage
- Noisium - optimizes world generation
- ModernFix - optimizes all kinds of things
- VMP - optimizes player lag
- Let Me Despawn - despawns culled mobs (can affect survival gameplay)
- Alternate Current - optimizes redstone (will affect vanilla redstone)
## Old Mods
- Starlight - optimizes Minecraft light engine
- Spark - performance profiling tools


# Best server java arguments:
`-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1 -XX:G1NewSizePercent=40 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=50 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=16M -XX:G1ReservePercent=15 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=20 -Dusing.aikars.flags=https://mcflags.emc.gs -Daikars.new.flags=true`

(These are good for ram above 10gb)

# This modpack contains experimental mods (C2ME & Krypton), you have been warned
